Araceae.watering: Water when top 1-2 inches of soil are dry. Prefers consistently moist but not waterlogged soil.
Araceae.light: Bright, indirect light. Can tolerate low light but grows slower.
Araceae.humidity: Prefers 50-60% humidity. Mist regularly or use humidifier.
Araceae.soil: Well-draining potting mix with peat moss or coco coir.
Araceae.fertilizer: Monthly during growing season (spring/summer) with balanced liquid fertilizer.

Cactaceae.watering: Water sparingly. Allow soil to dry completely between waterings. Water every 2-3 weeks in summer, monthly in winter.
Cactaceae.light: Full sun to bright light. Needs 4-6 hours of direct sunlight.
Cactaceae.temperature: 70-90°F (21-32°C) during day. Can tolerate cooler nights.
Cactaceae.soil: Cactus/succulent mix with excellent drainage. Add sand or perlite.
Cactaceae.fertilizer: Monthly during growing season with diluted cactus fertilizer.

Asparagaceae.watering: Water when soil is dry. Very drought-tolerant. Every 2-3 weeks.
Asparagaceae.light: Low to bright indirect light. Very adaptable.
Asparagaceae.soil: Well-draining potting mix. Can handle poor soil.
Asparagaceae.fertilizer: Monthly during growing season. Can survive without fertilizer.
common_issues: Brown tips from fluoride in water

Marantaceae.watering: Keep soil consistently moist but not soggy. Water when top inch is dry.
Marantaceae.light: Medium to low indirect light. Avoid direct sun.
Marantaceae.humidity: High humidity 60-80%. Use humidifier or pebble tray.
Marantaceae.soil: Rich, well-draining potting mix with peat moss.
Marantaceae.fertilizer: Every 2 weeks during growing season with diluted fertilizer.
common_issues: Fading patterns from too much light

light.bright_indirect: Bright room, no direct sun rays
light.low_light: North-facing window or away from windows

when_to_repot: Roots growing out of drainage holes
repotting.best_time: Spring or early summer during active growth
repotting.pot_size: Choose pot 1-2 inches larger in diameter
